steps.title: Join two complete clauses
steps.content: The first clause says the Eiteljorg Museum has celebrated contemporary Native artists since 1989. The second clause says that in 2013 it awarded Buffalohead a fellowship. Both clauses are complete, so they need a strong boundary.

steps.title: Use a semicolon boundary
steps.content: A uses a comma before a conjunctive adverb, creating a comma splice. B uses only a comma. C uses 'and' without the comma needed to join independent clauses. A semicolon correctly connects the clauses. The answer is D.
